sourceTitle: GeoNames Syrian Arab Republic Gazetteer Extract

rawFiles.name: imports/raw/2026-06-28-localities/geonames-sy-populated-place-records.tsv
rawFiles.notes: Filtered SY.txt rows where feature class is P and the feature code represents a populated place candidate.

rawFiles.name: imports/raw/2026-06-28-localities/geonames-locality-match-report.json
rawFiles.notes: Local match report showing accepted one-to-one locality matches plus skipped ambiguous and duplicate candidates.

rawFiles.name: imports/raw/2026-06-28-localities/geonames-enriched-locality-records.json
rawFiles.notes: Accepted locality records after GeoNames enrichment.

transforms: Filtered the GeoNames Syria dump to populated-place feature codes.
Matched existing OpenSyria locality records to GeoNames rows using normalized names and aliases within a 2 km distance threshold.
Accepted only unambiguous one-to-one matches: one GeoNames candidate per locality and one locality per GeoNames ID.
Skipped ambiguous localities and duplicate GeoNames assignments for later manual review.
Added GeoNames IDs to accepted locality external identifiers.
Added selected GeoNames name and ASCII name values as English alternate-spelling aliases when they did not duplicate existing canonical names or aliases.
Updated locality kind from GeoNames feature codes only for administrative seats: PPLC, PPLA, and PPLA2 as city; PPLA3 as town.
Did not create new locality records from unmatched GeoNames rows.
reviewNotes: Accepted 3713 one-to-one GeoNames locality matches from 11735 populated-place candidate rows. Skipped 26 localities with multiple candidates and 6 GeoNames IDs that matched more than one locality. Added 6302 selected alternate-spelling aliases and updated 238 locality kind values.
